content.text: We’re at the forefront of integrating AI to not just work faster, but to work smarter. It’s our responsibility as organizational leaders to ensure that this technology elevates our teams’ creativity and aligns with our ethical values.”

Chair, Digital Data Design Institute at Harvard and
Dorothy & Michael Hintze Professor of Business Administration at Harvard Business School

elements.alt: Microsoft Teams Premium logo

content.text: Teams Premium

elements.alt: Lightbulb icon

content.text: Microsoft Teams Premium
INTELLIGENT COLLABORATION
Leverage AI to break down language barriers and support global teamwork

elements.alt: Screenshot of a Teams meeting showing live translated captions and transcript.

content.text: AI powered translation supports over 40 languages
Empower all participants to engage in the discussion
Microsoft Teams Premium
INTELLIGENT COLLABORATION
Make the meetings and calls you attend (and miss) more productive and impactful with AI

elements.alt: Screenshot of Teams showing the Recap tab with meeting recording, timeline markers, chapters, and AI-generated notes.

content.text: Save time capturing takeaways and action items
Personalized to the recording events most relevant to you
Help you quickly navigate to the information you want to review

Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.

sections.title: Teams Premium vs Microsoft 365 Copilot Intelligent Recap

elements.text: Teams Premium includes built-in summaries with intelligent recap. Microsoft 365 Copilot license will also include intelligent recap but expands on it with the ability to ask any question about the meeting or call

elements.alt: Comparison showing Teams Premium Intelligent recap features on the left and Microsoft 365 Copilot features on the right.

content.text: Built-in and automated
Standardized
Video, speaker, and chapter markers
Available after meeting only
On-demand
Based on unique prompts
Conversational interaction, with citations.
Available real-time (during and after meeting)

sections.title: Amanda uses intelligent recap to understand the key highlights of a missed meeting, then uses Copilot to progress her next steps

elements.alt: Screenshot sequence showing Amanda using intelligent recap and Copilot in Teams.

content.text: First, Amanda skims the highlights on the Recap tab such as AI-generated notes and suggested tasks.
She notices a task was assigned to her
She uses name mentions and speaker markers to hear about the task directly. And reviews the content shared using screenshare markers and Chapters.
In order to start making progress on her task, she asks Copilot to
organize the options discussed into a pros and cons table
The table helps Amanda identify her preferred route, but she is curious how the rest of the team feels about that option. She asks Copilot
how did the team react to option 2
to get a better sense of their sentiments during the meeting.

sections.title: How your organization benefits from M365 Copilot and Teams Premium

elements.alt: Venn diagram showing key scenarios for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Teams Premium, with overlapping features for users who frequently attend meetings.

content.text: Unleash creativity and productivity
High usage across different Microsoft 365 apps (Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, etc)
Create, edit, or review content frequently
Pull together information from multiple sources often
Analyze data or identify insights
Often creates or reviews content across Microsoft 365 apps
Frequently attends meetings or is often double booked for meetings
Modernize collaboration and communication for the next digital era
Works hybrid across in-office and remote locations
Communicates frequently with partners or customers outside the organization
Connects with clients and other employees who speak different languages
Needs to share confidential or regulated information in meetings or appointments
Facilitates and manage webinars or internal all-hands meetings
Schedules and runs virtual appointments
Key scenarios

elements.alt: Venn diagram comparing Microsoft 365 Copilot and Microsoft Teams Premium

R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Understand leadership and team guidance about when and why to come into the office

elements.alt: Screenshot of Teams calendar showing team guidance for office days.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Using Places Finder, make room and desk booking decisions with additional data: images of the space, floorplans, information about technology available.

elements.alt: Screenshot of Places Finder showing floorplans and available desks/rooms.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Get recommendations on available rooms for all your meetings for the day– and quickly book them all at once

elements.alt: Screenshot of Intelligent booking suggesting rooms for multiple meetings at once.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Places in Teams Premium
Receive actionable insights and explanations of data with Copilot to make better facility decisions

elements.alt: Screenshot of Copilot explaining space analytics with charts for building attendance.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Build your brand into every interaction
Branded join lobby:
See the logo and colors of your company when attendees join.
Org backgrounds:
Ensure a professional look-and-feel through brand-approved backgrounds
Custom together modes:
Incorporate your brand into more fun and personalized ways to meet

elements.alt: Screenshot showing a custom branded join lobby in Microsoft Teams.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Host and deliver large-scale, professionally produced employee events to drive meaningful connections across your organization
High capacity:
Invite and host up to 20K attendees
Custom emails:
Entice your audience to attend and personalize the post-event recording email
Real-time insights:
Monitor the performance to ensure a seamless experience
Microsoft eCDN:
Ensure high-quality video connectivity

elements.alt: Screenshot of an Advanced Town Hall event in Microsoft Teams.

content.text:
R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Host high-quality webinars using advanced functionality to drive deeper engagement and generate new leads
Registration:
Manage demand with waitlist and manual approvals
Hide attendees:
Enhance privacy by hiding attendee names
RTMP-in:
Delivery dynamic content by streaming different media types
Measure engagement:
Assess how content performed with engagement analytics reports

elements.alt: Screenshot of an Advanced Webinar presentation in Teams.

content.text:

Enhanced customer communications with advanced call queue handling

Identify service improvement opportunities

content.text: R I C H E N G A G E M E N T S
Microsoft Teams Premium
Create your own custom immersive experiences and solutions.
Invite and host up to 200 attendees
Tailor a preset environment or build a new experience
Orchestrate unique, dynamic experiences with event production capabilities.

elements.alt: Screenshot of a virtual meeting space in Microsoft Mesh with avatars

content.text: Teams Premium
P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Safeguard confidential information exchanged in meetings
Automate setup of meeting protection options**
Prevent unauthorized meeting recordings and transcriptions
Deter leaks of shared content
Enable additional privacy protections*
*Teams protects your data with encryption in transit and at rest for all meetings
**Customers with an E5 license or E5 compliance

elements.alt: Screenshot of meeting options showing settings for who can bypass the lobby, record automatically, and apply a watermark

content.text: P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Empower administrators with refined control and in-depth insights
Reduce sprawl and mitigate risks of information leakage
Drill into detailed views and track trends over time

elements.alt: Screenshot of Microsoft Teams admin center showing collaboration activity and inactive teams

content.text: P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T
Microsoft Teams Premium
Ensure quality experiences with real-time meeting performance insights and advanced reporting
Proactively monitor meeting quality to identify and address audio, video and app-sharing related issues while the meeting is in progress.

elements.caption: Comparison of AI capabilities across Microsoft Teams licenses
elements.summary: This table lists various AI capabilities deeply embedded in Teams, for meeting experiences, and other capabilities, comparing their availability across Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Teams Premium, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.

content.text: Not an exhaustive list of AI capabilities.

Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.
All licenses include Commercial Data Protection and Microsoft 365 Security, Privacy, and Compliance.
